Kabrios main public site — AI-powered compliance and security operations platform.

Primary pages:
- https://www.kabrios.com/
- https://www.kabrios.com/product.html
- https://www.kabrios.com/aws.html
- https://www.kabrios.com/microsoft.html
- https://www.kabrios.com/google-cloud.html
- https://www.kabrios.com/docs.html
- https://www.kabrios.com/trust/
- https://www.kabrios.com/#pricing
- https://www.kabrios.com/#about-us

Key facts:
- AI-native: actively tells your team what to do next (not passive dashboards)
- Transparent pricing: $0 Starter, $199/mo Professional base with 2 frameworks, +$49/mo per additional framework, Custom
- Month-to-month by default (no annual lock-in)
- Supports certification readiness — does not perform audits or certify
- Certification Coordination available as add-on service
- Native integrations: AWS (Security Hub, GuardDuty, Config, Audit Manager), Microsoft (Defender, Azure Policy, Entra), Google Cloud (SCC, Cloud Asset Inventory)
